summary: Demo Mode feature testing complete. All core Demo Mode functionality working correctly: toggle in nav header, purple banner with correct text, PRO gating bypass on Copy Trading and Leaderboard pages, mobile menu toggle, sessionStorage persistence, and toggle OFF via X button or nav toggle.

issues: 'Upgrade to unlock full features' banner (data-testid='demo-mode-banner') is shown in Demo Mode - this is intentional per code design to remind users they can upgrade, but may be confusing since Demo Mode is supposed to 'unlock all features visually'

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly when not logged in
Login flow works with demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com / NewPass1234!
Demo Mode toggle visible in nav header (data-testid='demo-mode-toggle') when authenticated
Clicking Demo toggle shows purple banner 'Demo Mode: Data simulated for preview.' (data-testid='demo-mode-global-banner')
Demo Mode banner has X button (data-testid='demo-banner-close') that closes banner and disables Demo Mode
Clicking Demo toggle again disables Demo Mode and hides banner
PRO badge appears in nav header when Demo Mode is ON
Dashboard shows AI signals with live data in Demo Mode
'Delayed' badge on signals is hidden in Demo Mode (PRO gating bypassed)
Copy Trading page loads with full access in Demo Mode (no PRO gate)
Leaderboard page loads with 'Copy' buttons available in Demo Mode (PRO feature unlocked)
Mobile menu has Demo Mode toggle (data-testid='demo-mode-toggle-mobile')
Mobile Demo Mode toggle enables Demo Mode and shows banner
Demo Mode state persists across page navigation (sessionStorage working)
critical_code_review_comments: Demo Mode implementation is well-structured with DemoModeContext providing global state
Live simulation updates every 3-5 seconds as specified
sessionStorage persistence working correctly for Demo Mode state
PRO gating bypass implemented correctly using effectivePro = demoMode || isPro pattern
All required data-testid attributes are present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo Mode feature fully tested and working. Key test-ids: demo-mode-toggle (desktop nav), demo-mode-toggle-mobile (mobile menu), demo-mode-global-banner (top banner), demo-banner-close (X button). Demo Mode uses mockData.js for simulated data and updates every 3-5 seconds. PRO gating is bypassed using effectivePro = demoMode || isPro pattern.

mocked_apis.note: Demo Mode uses mockData.js for all simulated data when enabled
mocked_list: All dashboard data in Demo Mode via DemoModeContext - signals, portfolio stats, agents, strategies, copy traders, leaderboard, chart data
